name: Delivery options are displayed on the product detail page
scenarioId: delivery_options:Delivery options are displayed on the product detail page
methodName: Delivery options are displayed on the product detail page

testSteps.description: Given the shopper has navigated to a product detail page

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: Then the delivery section should be visible
And the delivery section should contain radio button options

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to choose a delivery option for a product
  So that I can select the shipping method that suits me

title: Delivery options are displayed on the product detail page
